traits.t: Vi's Hop leaves her airborne and lets her act very quickly compared to a normal Hop.
Vi's D gives her unique aerial mobility.
Vi is short and always takes crouching hitstun.

pros.p: High mobility with fast movement speed and flight.
Unique hop gives access to strong instant overheads.
Decent combination of speed, range, and disjoint.

cons.c: Eats up SP with high-cost Skills.
Always takes crouching hitstun, so everyone can do longer combos on her.

normals.name: {{ n5 }}{{ C }}
normals.description:
Wide backhanded slash.
Charged version grants extra hitstun and damage, and Critical Counters on counterhit.

normals.name: {{ n2 }}{{ C }}
normals.description: Low needle swipe. Moves forward a little bit.

normals.name: {{ j }}{{ A }}
normals.description:
Downwards needle slash.
The downwards angle lets you use it as an instant overhead with her hop.

normals.name: {{ j }}{{ B }}
normals.description: Forward slash. Has the most horizontal range of Vi's air normals by a little bit.

normals.name: {{ j }}{{ C }}
normals.description:
Spins upside down and slashes.
Has a wide range and hits on both sides, but kinda slow to start.
Charged version has extra damage and hitstun.
